pieces.center: Desert sand surface, soft golden (#C2956B) sand with subtle wave patterns
pieces.top: Sand top edge meeting rocky terrain, scattered pebbles
pieces.bottom: Bottom edge, sand drifting over stone, wind-blown pattern
pieces.left: Left edge, sand gradient thinning to reveal rock below

sd.prompt: (masterpiece:1.3), (best quality:1.2), 2D pixel art tileset, top-down RPG tile, desert sand surface, golden sand (#C2956B) with wave patterns, scattered pebbles, arid landscape, dark fantasy desert ruins aesthetic, seamless, (2px black outline:1.3), (clean pixel edges:1.4), 32x32, 3-step shading, {piece_description}, <lora:pixel-art-style-v2:0.7>, <lora:custom-aeterna-v1:0.8>
sd.negative: 3D render, realistic, blurry, watermark, text, low quality, noisy, perspective, character, snow, forest

dalle.prompt: Top-down 2D pixel art RPG tile, 32x32 pixels, desert sand for ancient ruins desert. Golden (#C2956B) sand with wave patterns, pebbles. {piece_description}. Clean pixel edges, black outline, seamless. Dark fantasy desert.

midjourney.prompt: top-down 2D pixel art RPG tile, desert sand, golden wave patterns, ancient ruins desert, {piece_description}, 32x32, clean edges, outline, seamless --ar 1:1 --s 250 --niji 6

pieces.bottom: Bottom edge, rock shelf with sand accumulation below
pieces.left: Left edge, layered sandstone strata visible

sd.prompt: (masterpiece:1.3), 2D pixel art tileset, top-down, sandstone rock surface, reddish-brown (#8B4513) sedimentary layers, wind-eroded, desert, seamless, (2px outline:1.3), (clean pixel:1.4), 32x32, {piece_description}, <lora:pixel-art-style-v2:0.7>, <lora:custom-aeterna-v1:0.8>
sd.negative: 3D, realistic, blurry, watermark, low quality, character

generation_notes.autotile_workflow: Generate center tile first → derive edges/corners via inpainting
generation_notes.heat_effects: Day variants include heat haze shimmer overlay; Night variants show (#FFD700) crystal glow
generation_notes.post_process: remove_bg → color_correct to palette → qa_runner tile-seamless check
